gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, updating the latest news and community apps.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community applications.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot updating a giant billboard or painting a sign, representing the automated bot updating the README.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head painting a fresh coat of lime green (#ecf874) paint on a wooden bulletin board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a small bucket of pastel lavender paint. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
